reviews.review_description:
It’s a good game it has potential it just needs some work a couple things missing like public game or actual game modes and ect. 
If you have a team working on this can I join your team cause I would help a lot and if I can’t can I get moderator so if this game grows I can get rid of all the bad players like cheating toxicity and stuff like that overall it’s a good game just needs some work. :)

Since I’m a Co Owner in the Game I Am Hiring 1 Moderator So the First Person To Find This Helpful I Will Give Them Moderator
  
(Text Me Or Friend Request Me)

Owners:Isy-Me-Oscar

Tysm For Reading This And Bye


Signed By Isy/Owner
The player model the crashed plane and a bunch of other stuff is stolen
It needs more mods and the mods are hard to take off and Apex needs more map like an ice map, a beach map etc.overall a great game though but I love the free mods 😁

It was really good! But i think the creator can add some more stuff and make the water swimmable. The leaves on the trees messed me up a few times so maybe the creator can turn the collisions off, i dont mind if the creator keeps the collision on. Also the creator could add more maps and biggers and better slides and also add currency to the game. The avatar is really good. Dont forget to try it out for yourself!
